title: Josephia hewardiana
taxonomy: Josephia hewardiana is a genus of flowering plants in the family Iridaceae. The genus Josephia is typically classified within the subfamily Iridoideae. Josephia hewardiana is native to the southern parts of the Western Cape Province in South Africa. Within the genus, Josephia hewardiana is a species of flowering plants known to be part of the Iridaceae family. The classification of Josephia hewardiana places it within the monocot family of flowering plants.
